query: PlayStation Days of Play 2026 announcement blog post May 2026
answer:
## Research Report: PlayStation Days of Play 2026

### Key Finding: Not Yet Announced (as of May 18, 2026)

As of May 18, 2026, **Sony has not yet published a Days of Play 2026 announcement on the PlayStation Blog**. This was confirmed by reviewing:

1. The **PlayStation Blog main RSS feed** — the most recent post is from May 15, 2026 ("Official PlayStation Podcast Episode 541: Legendary Run"), with no Days of Play 2026 mention.
2. The **PlayStation Blog "days-of-play" tag feed** — the most recent entry is the **Days of Play 2025** announcement from May 27, 2025.

---

### Historical Pattern: Announcement & Sale Dates

Days of Play follows a highly consistent annual pattern — announcements arrive in the **last week of May**, with the sale beginning 1 day after:

| Year | Announcement Date | Sale Start | Sale End | Duration |
|------|-------------------|------------|----------|----------|
| 2022 | May 24, 2022 | May 25, 2022 | ~June 8, 2022 | ~14 days |
| 2023 | May 29, 2023 | June 2, 2023 | ~June 12, 2023 | ~10 days |
| 2024 | May 28, 2024 | May 29, 2024 | June 12, 2024 | 14 days |
| 2025 | May 27, 2025 | May 28, 2025 | June 11, 2025 | 14 days |

Based on this trajectory, the **2026 announcement is most likely around May 26–28, 2026**, with the sale running approximately **late May through mid-June 2026** (~14 days).

---

### What Days of Play Typically Includes (Based on 2024–2025)

#### Hardware & Accessory Deals
- **PS5 console bundles**: up to ~$120 off (2025: $399.99 for Call of Duty bundle)
- **PS5 Pro**: $50 off (2025)
- **PlayStation VR2**: $50–$100 off
- **DualSense controllers**: $20 off; DualSense Edge: $30 off
- **Pulse Explore earbuds**: $30 off

#### PlayStation Plus Discounts
- Up to **30–33% off** 12-month memberships
- **25–33% off** tier upgrades (to Extra/Premium/Deluxe)

#### PlayStation Store Digital Deals
- Hundreds of games and add-ons discounted
- Multiple **24-hour flash sales** throughout the event

#### PS Plus Content Drops
- June Monthly Games revealed alongside the announcement
- Bonus Game Catalog and Classics Catalog additions
- Game Trials for Premium/Deluxe members

#### Community Events
- **Community challenges**: Players collectively work toward goals for rewards
- **PlayStation Tournaments** with prizes
- **Free avatars** for all PlayStation players
- **PlayStation Stars campaigns**

#### Other
- **PlayStation Gear Store**: ~20% off storewide
- **Direct.PlayStation.com**: Free shipping, exclusive bundles

---

### Sources
- PlayStation Blog Days of Play 2025: https://blog.playstation.com/2025/05/27/celebrate-days-of-play-2025-starting-on-may-28/
- PlayStation Blog Days of Play 2024: https://blog.playstation.com/2024/05/28/get-ready-days-of-play-celebration-kicks-off-on-may-29/
- PlayStation Blog Days of Play 2023: https://blog.playstation.com/2023/05/29/days-of-play-2023-sale-kicks-off-on-june-2/
- PlayStation Blog Days of Play 2022: https://blog.playstation.com/2022/05/24/days-of-play-2022-sale-starts-may-25/
- PlayStation Blog RSS feeds (main + days-of-play tag)

key_facts: As of May 18, 2026, Sony has NOT yet published a Days of Play 2026 announcement on the PlayStation Blog.
The most recent Days of Play blog post is for 2025, published May 27, 2025.
Days of Play announcements historically occur May 24–29, with the sale starting 1 day after announcement.
Days of Play 2025 ran May 28 – June 11, 2025 (14 days); 2024 ran May 29 – June 12, 2024 (14 days).
Based on the consistent pattern, the 2026 announcement is expected around May 26–28, 2026.
Typical deals include PS5 console bundles up to ~$120 off, 30–33% off PS Plus 12-month memberships, hundreds of digital game discounts, hardware/accessory discounts, and community challenges.
Days of Play 2025 offered PS5 bundles at $399.99 (saving up to $119.99), $50 off PS5 Pro, $50 off PSVR2, up to 33% off PS Plus annual plans.
Days of Play 2024 offered $50 off PS5 consoles, $100 off PSVR2, up to 30% off PS Plus annual plans for new members.
The PlayStation Blog main feed's most recent post as of May 18, 2026 is from May 15, 2026 (PlayStation Podcast Episode 541).
